item.name: Horse Chestnut Necklace Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing an accessory, probably a necklace, if the faint jangling sounds from within are to be believed.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Necklace type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
